meta.title: Casey Chinese Series — Global Character Library
meta.note: Design-time source of truth. Each book's printed Character Ledger (back matter) is generated from / kept in sync with this file.

statusKey.W: Write — taught fully, student writes it
statusKey.R: Recognize — read for meaning+sound, need not write
statusKey.S: Supported — appears only with pinyin/gloss; not expected known alone

supportKey.poem-pinyin: carried with full line-pinyin in 诵读 poem
supportKey.proper-noun: bracket pinyin gloss on first appearance
supportKey.footnote: 难词注释 footnote under reading passage
supportKey.radical-gloss: glossed as radical/component in 部首/字源 box
supportKey.culture-gloss: covered by adjacent English gloss in Culture Corner

flagsResolved.noIllegalStates: B1 prints full pinyin on every Chinese character (cover, headings, body, poems, word lists), so the Support Rule is auto-satisfied — no character can be in an illegal bare state. The Ledger is documentation of status, not a fix list.
flagsResolved.backbone: Function-word backbone verified: 64 of the 67 backbone characters appear in B1, all as W or R (none left as S). High-frequency core (的 是 我 你 不 有 在 了 他 …) is introduced in Unit 1; 六–十 enter in Unit 3 (the Numbers unit). Only 被/应/该 are absent — intentionally deferred beyond Foundation.
flagsResolved.writeCore: 56 Write characters = 40 core (≈5/unit, taught with stroke order + 写一写 trace box) + 16 拓展学写字 further-study write characters (我·再·哥·姐·六·八·鼻·脚·猫·狗·菜·肉·纸·听·龙·红). Matches the book's own 字表 appendix.
flagsResolved.supportTags: S register (56) grouped by lifeline: poem-pinyin (chars appearing only inside 诵读/儿歌 recite lines, carried with full line pinyin), radical-gloss (亻宀豕纟氵扌艹灬礻犭犬乛冖丿囗 — taught as components in 部首角), proper-noun (朱 凯 娜 陶 邵 雍 李 绅 骆 宾 王 — names/cover pigment, always bracket-pinyin glossed).

flagsResolved.noIllegalStates: B2 prints pinyin on all Chinese (cover, headings, body, poems, word lists, dialogue, exercises); only English UI text is bare. The Support Rule is therefore auto-satisfied — no character can appear in an illegal bare state. The Ledger documents status; it is not a fix list.
flagsResolved.backbone: Function-word backbone: 65 of 67 present, all W/R, none S. 被 — deferred beyond Foundation — now enters in U5 (R). 应/该 are still absent from B2; they enter in B3 (R, U2). High-frequency core (个 的 是 有 不 我 你 他 …) recycled from U1.
flagsResolved.writeCore: 77 Write characters = 48 core (6/unit, taught with stroke order + 写一写 trace charcards) + 29 拓展学写字 further-study writes for 读写作业 (Reading & writing) students, tagged U#·拓 (the 认一认 set those students also learn to write). NOTE: the 字表 appendix labels this set '(32)' but the printed run lists 30 distinct (秋 duplicated) and one of them (午) is already a core write char — a copy miscount flagged for fixing, not a status issue.
flagsResolved.supportTags: S register (82) grouped by lifeline: poem-pinyin (chars appearing only inside 诵读 poem lines — 《早起歌》《春晓》《悯农》《静夜思》《找朋友》 — carried with full line pinyin), culture-gloss (terms appearing only in 文化角, each with an adjacent English or bracket-pinyin gloss), proper-noun (names: 娜 孟 浩 李 绅 屈 墨 尔 — Anna, Meng Hao(ran), Li Shen, Qu(Yuan), Mel(bourne) — always bracket-pinyin glossed), radical-gloss (components met in 部首角).

flagsResolved.poemTitles: romanized — .bktitle-py muted line added to all 7 classical poem heads (title + author)
flagsResolved.recogniseRows: pinyin anchored — every 认一认 character now carries per-character ruby (one ruby per char, on top), matching §1
flagsResolved.properNouns: lifelines kept — 墨尔本/昆士兰/布里斯班/黄金海岸/杰克 keep bracket pinyin per the strict Support Rule

flagsResolved.noIllegalStates: every distinct Hanzi resolves to W/R, or to S with a per-occurrence lifeline. The book already footnotes every hard reading word (难词注释), so a sweep of all pinyin-withdrawn zones (running text, dialogue, exercises) found zero un-supported bare characters.
flagsResolved.supportTags: S register grouped by lifeline: footnote (难词注释 word-gloss under passages), poem-pinyin (诵读 line glosses), proper-noun (黛/宋/杜甫 bracket pinyin; recurring names 唐/秦/汤姆 promoted to R), culture-gloss (文化角 terms), radical-gloss (字源/部首 components in char-study boxes).
flagsResolved.promotedToR: 140 characters first met bare in B4 running text promoted to Recognise (policy: promote upward, don't expand Write). Write core held at 48 (6/unit).
